name: Kai
background: Works at a mid-size tech company. Early AI adopter who consults AI agents daily for design feedback, coding assistance, and drafting emails.
ai_relationship: Enthusiastic user who sees AI as a reliable collaborator. Tends to trust AI output without questioning the systems behind it.
likely_triggers: AI gives better feedback than my team
I use AI for everything now
AI is so much faster than doing it myself
My AI assistant understands my design intent
emotional_baseline: Optimistic and confident, but genuinely open to nuance when prompted
